allow: PowerShell($dir = "D:\\Projects\\Booking\\backend\\node_modules\\.prisma\\client"; if \(Test-Path $dir\) { Get-ChildItem $dir -Recurse | Remove-Item -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Cleared $dir" } else { "Dir does not exist" })

PowerShell($pkg = Get-Content "d:\\Projects\\Booking\\backend\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "--- prisma block ---"; $pkg.prisma | ConvertTo-Json; "--- seed script in scripts ---"; $pkg.scripts | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($body = @{ email = 'admin@bookingdeo.com'; password = 'demo1234' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -ErrorAction Stop; "SUCCESS"; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { $_.ErrorDetails.Message } else { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($emails = @\('admin@bookingdeo.com', 'pro@bookingdeo.com', 'free@bookingdeo.com'\); foreach \($e in $emails\) { $body = @{ email = $e; password = 'demo1234' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "$e -> $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $msg = if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { $_.ErrorDetails.Message } else { $_.Exception.Message }; "$e -> $code : $msg" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; "--- backend health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "DOWN: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "--- test login ---"; $body = @{ email = 'admin@bookingdeo.com'; password = 'demo1234' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "LOGIN OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $msg = if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { $_.ErrorDetails.Message } else { $_.Exception.Message }; "LOGIN $code : $msg" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; "--- port 3000 ---"; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3000 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "--- HEAD / ---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "Got $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) { "Got $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } else { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
